descriptionShort: Red Deer Rustlers lose 7-3 to Richmond Sockeyes in Western Centennial Cup semifinal game, series tied 3-3.
descriptionLong: The Red Deer Rustlers fell 7-3 to the Richmond Sockeyes on April 16, 1987, in a Western Centennial Cup semifinal playoff game before 2,020 fans at Red Deer Arena. The best-of-seven series is now tied at 3-3, with the deciding game scheduled for that evening at 7:30 p.m. Reporter Greg Meachem notes the Rustlers' unpredictable season throughout.

attribution.headline: Rustlers blew a chance to put the Richmond Sockeyes in cold storage
